canonical_name: Transforming Growth Factor Beta Receptor II
step_rationale: TGF-β signaling regulates ECM synthesis and smooth-muscle migration during cap degradation.
mechanism: TGFBR2 mediates TGF-β signaling controlling smooth-muscle proliferation and extracellular-matrix remodeling during fibrous-cap thinning.

references.title: miR-520e and its promoter region DNA methylation as potential biomarkers in atherosclerosis.
